expect: Map 8 swarm patterns against 5 transferability dimensions (infrastructure cost, cultural requirements, legal compatibility, feedback-loop fidelity, compaction analog). Predict compaction > expect-act-diff in transferability (contra F-HS2 default prediction). Test: >=3 patterns score TRANSFERABLE on >=3 dimensions.
actual: 4/8 patterns HIGH transfer: compaction, EAD, anti-windup, context handoffs. 1 MEDIUM (concurrent lanes), 3 LOW (quorum, challenges, colony). Discriminant: authority-redistribution vs process-augmentation. L-601 confirmed institutionally (UK PSAs abandoned 12y). Military = closest substrate.
diff: Predicted compaction > EAD: WRONG (both HIGH). Predicted >=3 TRANSFERABLE: CONFIRMED (4). Novel: discriminant is structural binary not per-pattern. Feedback-loop fidelity weakest across all patterns.
